expectations.evidence: Response provides 5 touches labeled 'اللمسة الأولى' through 'اللمسة الخامسة' on days 1, 3, 5, 9, and 12, spanning 2-week timeframe.
Response uses professional, concise tone appropriate for CEOs: 'لا أريد أن أخذ وقتك الطويل' and focuses on business impact with respect for executive time constraints.
Response mentions 'شركات البناء السعودية' and includes Saudi-specific business references like 'المشاريع الحكومية' (government projects).

expectations.text: Includes at least 2 different channels (email + LinkedIn or call)
expectations.evidence: Sequence includes email (touches 1, 3, 5), phone call (touch 3 mentioned as 'اتصال هاتفي'), and implies LinkedIn based on document context. All three channels are represented.

expectations.text: Each touch has specific copy (subject + body or message text)
expectations.evidence: All 5 touches include specific copy with subjects and message content. Touch 1 has subject 'فرصة لتحسين كفاءة المشاريع', Touch 3 has phone call script, Touch 4 has subject 'دراسة حالة', Touch 5 has subject 'فرصة محدودة - استشارة مجانية'.
